description_long: This object consists of a stack of three vintage-style suitcases, each with a rectangular form and constructed from what appears to be worn, textured leather. The suitcases are various shades of brown, with the topmost being the lightest and smallest, and the bottom one the darkest and largest. Each suitcase features visible metal latches and buckles, with the middle suitcase displaying a leather tag and two prominent straps. The handles are fixed and made of leather or a similar material, attached to the front of each suitcase. The surfaces show signs of age, such as scuffs and subtle creases, giving them a rugged, well-traveled appearance. The overall look is utilitarian yet classic, suitable for period or urban settings.
description: A stack of three vintage brown leather suitcases with metal latches, fixed handles, and visible wear, exuding a classic, rugged charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three suitcases stacked, with visible handles, latches, and a leather tag on the middle suitcase.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain backs of the suitcases, with no handles or latches visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the layered arrangement and the thickness of each suitcase, with straps and buckles partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ends of the suitcases, with rivets and seams visible but no handles or latches.
